name: Peanuts 'n Candy Halloween Cake
recipeInstructions:
Vanilla Frosting Supreme
1/4 cup Peanut butter
1/2 cup Unsalted roasted peanuts (coarsely chopped)
Butterfinger bar (chopped)
Candy corn or 16 Candy pumpkins
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9-inch pan. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients. Beat until moistened, then beat for an additional 2 minutes at high speed. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely. In a medium bowl, mix frosting and peanut butter until smooth. Spread evenly over the cake. Sprinkle with peanuts and chopped Butterfinger bar. Arrange candy corn or Candy pumpkins on top. Yield: 12-16 servings.
